title: Author
description: An intellectual author of a Work. Authors MUST be human (is_human=true). The human-authorship invariant is enforced by ASV-WORK-004 and ASV-PROV-001/003 via the explicit is_human attestation (not by name matching).

is_human.description: Explicit attestation. MUST be true for an author (semantic rule).

agent_type.description: Optional explicit classification; anything other than 'human' is rejected for authorship.

orcid.description: ORCID iD; checksum verified by ASV-WORK-004.
